LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS PETER REMEDIOS A/K/A PETER DALMADO A/K/A PETER DALMADA, REMEDIOS STUDIO LONG BEACH, INC., CHHADA SIEMBIEDA REMEDIOS, INC., REMEDIOS STUDIO SAN FRANCISCO, INC., FORMALLY KNOWN AS REMEDIOS SIEMBIEDA, INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - DEFENDANTS' DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO ALL CAUSES OF ACTION AGAINST PETER REMEDIOS, AN INDIVIDUAL, AND CHHADA SIEMBIEDA REMEDIOS. PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO PLEAD HOW THESE PARTIES WERE INVOLVED IN THE BREACH OF CONTRACT OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT, FRAUD AND MISREPRESENTATION. THE DEMURRER IS OVERRULED AS TO ALL CAUSES OF ACTION AGAINST REMEDIOS SIEMBIEDA INC.; REMEDIOS STUDIO SAN FRANCISCO, AND REMEDIOS STUDIO LONG BEACH. MOVING PARTY TO PREPARE A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. (302)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-12-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANTS PETER REMEDIOS A/K/A PETER DALMADO A/K/A PETER DALMADA, REMEDIOS STUDIO LONG BEACH, INC., CHHADA SIEMBIEDA REMEDIOS, INC., REMEDIOS STUDIO SAN FRANCISCO, INC., FORMALLY KNOWN AS REMEDIOS SIEMBIEDA, INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.

APPEARANCES: Gregory S. Nerland, Esq. of Akawie & LaPietra 925/979-5661 for pltf & opposing party (appearing via CourtCall); Richard M. Watts, Jr., Esq. of Millstone, Peterson & Watts, LLP 916/780-8222 for defts & moving parties (appearing via CourtCall).

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - DEFENDANTS' DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO ALL CAUSES OF ACTION AGAINST PETER REMEDIOS, AN INDIVIDUAL, AND CHHADA SIEMBIEDA REMEDIOS. PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO PLEAD HOW THESE PARTIES WERE INVOLVED IN THE BREACH OF CONTRACT OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT, FRAUD AND MISREPRESENTATION. THE DEMURRER IS OVERRULED AS TO ALL CAUSES OF ACTION AGAINST REMEDIOS SIEMBIEDA INC.; REMEDIOS STUDIO SAN FRANCISCO, AND REMEDIOS STUDIO LONG BEACH. Moving party to prepare a proposed form of order. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
